details: Soulattrin m.p. 180-181 °C confirmed in Section 3.4 of 10.3390/molecules16053999; quote matches with only minor en-dash vs hyphen punctuation.
Table 1 of 10.3390/nano14131077 shows 'LiClO3 ·3H2 O 8 253'; melting point 8 °C confirmed for LiClO3·3H2O.
M21 = 2-((4-(3-Chlorophenyl)-5-Cyano-6-Oxo-1,6-Dihydropyrimidin-2-yl)thio)-N-(4-(N,N-Diethylsulfamoyl)Phenyl)Acetamide with mp 255-258 °C verified in 10.3390/molecules29194778.
M13 = 2-((4-(4-Chlorophenyl)-5-Cyano-6-Oxo-1,6-Dihydropyrimidin-2-yl)thio)-N-(4-((4-Methylpiperazin-1-yl)Sulfonyl)Phenyl)Acetamide with mp 225-227 °C verified in 10.3390/molecules29194778.
Section 3.1.5 of 10.3390/molecules26175383: 'resulting in thione 6. Yield (40%); mp. 250 o C; IR (KBr)' — mp 250 °C confirmed.
In DSC binary mixtures section of 10.3390/pharmaceutics12080741: ITR-TER cocrystal shows 'sharp endothermic peak at 198 °C' — confirmed.
PMC13084458 article text: '4-(2-Chlorophenyl)-N-phenethylpiperazine-1-carbothioamide (3k) White solid; 111.76 °C; IR (KBr)' verified verbatim.
Compound 4t = (E)-2,5-dioxo-1-(2-oxo-2-phenylethylidene)-cyclohepta[4,5]thieno-pyrrolo-pyrimidine-3-carbonitrile with mp 284-285 °С verified in 10.1021/acs.joc.9b00711.
DSC results in 10.15171/apb.2017.048 page 403: 'peak onset for pure drug was obtained at 199.60 °C' — Piroxicam DSC onset verified.
Section 3.1.8 of 10.3390/molecules26175383: '10. Yield (75%), mp. 210-211 °C; IR (KBr)' verified for Bis(1,2,3-triazole) compound 10.

PMC13103808 / 10.1021/acsomega.6c01037 Section 2.3.8: compound 11 = 1-(2-(2-(Benzyloxy)-5-bromo-4-methylphenyl)-2-oxoethyl)pyrrolidine-2,5-dione, mp 88-90 °C verified; DOI matches paper despite citation year typo.
PMC9486790: '2-(((2-Chlorothiazol-5-yl)methyl)thio)-5-(1-methyl-3-(trifluoromethyl)-1H-pyrazol-4-yl)-1,3,4-oxadiazole (5j) Mp. 94-95 °C, yellow solid' verified verbatim.
Table 1 of 10.3390/81000735: '2e m-CNC6H4 CH3- 47 116' confirms mp 116 °C for furanone 2e.
M10 = 2-((4-(4-Bromophenyl)-5-Cyano-6-Oxo-1,6-Dihydropyrimidin-2-yl)Thio)-N-(4-(Thiomorpholinosulfonyl)Phenyl)Acetamide with mp 224-226 °C verified in 10.3390/molecules29194778.
DSC results of 10.3390/pharmaceutics12080741: 'endothermic peak with an onset at 164 °C (Figure 3), assigned to the melting of ITR' — ITR DSC onset verified.
Table I of 1990 Yalkowsky paper: '1,4-Dibromobenzene 87 220' confirms mp 87 °C; legacy: identifier and journal citation are complete.
Table III of 1990 Yalkowsky paper: 'Toluene 383 178 185 -7 0.30 2.8 0' (paper uses em-dash for negatives); 178 K - 273.15 = -95.15 °C conversion arithmetic correct.
Table III of 1990 Yalkowsky paper: 'Benzonitrile 464 260 275 -15 0.30 3.7 0' (paper uses em-dash); 260 K - 273.15 = -13.15 °C conversion arithmetic correct.
DSC slurry section of 10.3390/pharmaceutics12080741: 'peak with an onset at 195 °C' for ITR-TER slurry samples verified.
SI Section 3.3.4 / 4.23 of 10.3762/bjoc.19.99: '4-(1-Methyl-2-phenyl-1H-indol-3-yl)benzonitrile (8d)11 ... compound 8d (140 mg, 91%) was isolated as a colorless solid, Mp 194.2 °C' verified.

Experimental section of 10.1021/acs.joc.9b00711: compound 4j Ethyl (E)-8-(2-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-oxoethylidene)-2,3-dimethyl-4,7-dioxo-4,5,7,8-tetrahydropyrrolo[1,2-a]thieno[3,2-e]pyrimidine-6-carboxylate, Yellow solid; 1.71 g, 75 % yield; m.p. 250-251 °С verified.
Table 2 of 10.15171/apb.2017.048: Piroxicam-saccharine sodium (1:2) row shows mp 178-179 °C verified.
Table 2 of 10.15171/apb.2017.048: 'Piroxicam-Urea 132-135 171-173' confirms Piroxicam-Urea (1:1) mp 171-173 °C.
